ticket.description:
This is a follow-up to your previous request #374249 "Sv: [PluginHive] Re: Help w..."

Hi,

I’m having trouble issuing shipping labels. Please see the screenshot below.
I have checked my automation rules, but I can’t find anything wrong.

Could you please advise how to fix this?


[Ska¨rmavbild 2026-04-26 kl. 20.27.08.png]

Kind regards,

Federico Casado

Founder | Vera Clocks
Handcrafted Alarm Clocks from Sweden

www.veraclocks.com<http://www.veraclocks.com/>
Instagram: @veraclocks<https://www.instagram.com/veraclocks/>

Your request (374249) has been updated. To add additional comments, reply to this email.

[https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/system/photos/8939629394201/PS_7561.jpg]

Sibi (PluginHive)

Feb 15, 2026, 19:59 GMT+5:30

Hello Federico,

Thank you for reaching out to us!

Regarding the return shipment, yes, it is possible to create the return labels using the app.

For the same, you can select the order which is in Fulfilled status as shown in the screenshot below:

[https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/qE6APsfmWAst1SIn4x2YFrOCM/?name=image.png]

Click on More options as shown in the above screenshot.

Type in Return as in the screenshot below and select Create Return Label:

[https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/5DaPdtTyFvlrp4mkVBtG8RRIV/?name=image.png]

You need to enter the details as shown below and click on Submit.

[https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/yyOtiYQHvndtOwpjsFecYYlZP/?name=image.png]

Once the return label is generated, you can select the order and click on Print Return Label from the More Options.

Do check and let me know if you need any further assistance.

Regards,

Sibi Firoz
Team PluginHive
[https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/images/2016/default-avatar-80.png]

Federico

Feb 15, 2026, 16:40 GMT+5:30

This is a follow-up to your previous request #362536<https://support.pluginhive.com/tickets/362536> "Help with my app"
Hello!

I have a question, is it possible to create a return shipment for an order that was originally made in the MultiCarrier app?

I look forward to your reply.

Regards,

Federico Casado

Founder | Vera Clocks
Handcrafted Alarm Clocks from Sweden

Telefon: 010-641 10 05 | Mån – Fre 10:00 – 15:00
www.veraclocks.com<http://www.veraclocks.com/>
Instagram: @veraclocks<https://www.instagram.com/veraclocks/>


Your request (362536) has been updated. To add additional comments, reply to this email.

[https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/system/photos/8939629394201/PS_7561.jpg]

Sibi (PluginHive)

Dec 3, 2025, 15:48 GMT+5:30

Hello Federico,

Thank you for your time over the Zoom.

As disccused, your settings are intact and you can proceed with the label generation with UPS and do let me know if you need any further assistance.

Regards,

Sibi Firoz
Team PluginHive
[https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/system/photos/8939629394201/PS_7561.jpg]

Sibi (PluginHive)

Dec 3, 2025, 15:04 GMT+5:30

Hello Federico,

Good day!

We have a meeting scheduled at 11 am Stockholm time today. I am sharing the Zoom Invite below. Kindly confirm once you have joined.

Meeting Link:

Topic: PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App - Query Call
Time: Dec 3, 2025 11:00 AM Stockholm
Join Zoom Meeting
https://us04web.zoom.us/j/73250605831?pwd=k5yfc3vApNRibNBD8a3fI0iV7EhQ2s.1

Meeting ID: 732 5060 5831
Passcode: 2b1a2k

NOTE: The meeting is scheduled for 30 minutes. We kindly request you to be present on the call as per the scheduled timings, extending the call or delayed calls are not encouraged due to prior commitments.

Pre-requisites:

  *   Ensure that your system has a working microphone.
  *   Permissions to share screen


Regards,

Sibi Firoz
Team PluginHive
[https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/images/2016/default-avatar-80.png]

Federico

Dec 3, 2025, 02:17 GMT+5:30

Thank you, Sagar!
I’ve just booked the Zoom call for tomorrow.
Thanks again!

Federico Casado
Founder | Vera Clocks
Handcrafted Alarm Clocks from Sweden

+46 (0)72 312 30 62<tel:+46723123062>
www.veraclocks.com<http://www.veraclocks.com/>
Instagram: @veraclocks<https://www.instagram.com/veraclocks/>


[https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/system/photos/10479726420761/Image_-_Sagar.jpg]

Sagar K S (PluginHive)

Dec 3, 2025, 02:02 GMT+5:30

Hello Federico,

Thank you for sharing the details.

This can be set easily in the app. Can we connect over a Zoom call to discuss about this and set the app as per your requirement? You can book a slot for the call using this link - Click Here<https://appointments.pluginhive.com/appointment/book-a-slot/?storeUrl=ster1k-jc.myshopify.com&email=hello@veraclocks.com&ticket=362536&key=1764707507689>

Thanks and Regards,
Sagar K S
Team PluginHive
[https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/images/2016/default-avatar-80.png]

Federico

Dec 3, 2025, 01:54 GMT+5:30

Dear Sagar,

Thank you for your prompt response.

Apologies for the confusion in my previous email. I don’t want to display the UPS rates in the checkout since I offer free shipping. The automation currently works as follows: for orders within Sweden, the carrier is PostNord; for orders outside Sweden (EU and USA), the carrier is UPS, and for the USA the shipping condition is DDP.

I have now added two more markets — Switzerland and Great Britain — and since both are outside the EU, I want to ensure that these markets will also use UPS with DDP. However, I cannot find where to check or adjust this.

When I first installed the app, someone from your team helped set everything up, but now I am unable to locate where these settings can be reviewed or edited.

Could you please advise?

Kind regards,

Federico Casado
Founder | Vera Clocks
Handcrafted Alarm Clocks from Sweden

+46 (0)72 312 30 62<tel:+46723123062>
www.veraclocks.com<http://www.veraclocks.com/>
Instagram: @veraclocks<https://www.instagram.com/veraclocks/>


[https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/system/photos/10479726420761/Image_-_Sagar.jpg]

Sagar K S (PluginHive)

Dec 2, 2025, 21:45 GMT+5:30

Hello Federico,

Greetings from PluginHive!

To show the UPS rates at the checkout for any country, the "Carrier Calculated Shipping" feature should be enabled for your store.

Please reach out to the Shopify team to get this feature enabled. Once done, let us know.

Thanks and Regards,
Sagar K S
Team PluginHive
[https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/images/2016/default-avatar-80.png]

Federico

Dec 2, 2025, 21:02 GMT+5:30

Dear Sir or Madam,

I am currently using your app PH MultiCarrier Shipping Label on my Shopify store, with UPS as the carrier for the EU and USA and PostNord for Sweden, which is also my home market. I am very satisfied with your app.

I have now added two more markets, Switzerland and Great Britain, and I am unsure how to set UPS as the chosen carrier for these countries and ensure that shipments are sent DDP.

Would you be so kind as to assist me with the correct setup?

Best regards,

Federico Casado

Founder | Vera Clocks
Handcrafted Alarm Clocks from Sweden

Telefon: 010-641 10 05 | Mån – Fre 10:00 – 15:00
www.veraclocks.com<http://www.veraclocks.com/>
Instagram: @veraclocks<https://www.instagram.com/veraclocks/>

For the same, you can select the order which is in Fulfilled status as shown in the screenshot below:

You need to enter the details as shown below and click on Submit.
 

 
Once the return label is generated, you can select the order and click on Print Return Label from the More Options.
 
Do check and let me know if you need any further assistance.
 
Regards,

Thank you for reaching out to us!

 

Regarding the return shipment, yes, it is possible to create the return labels using the app.

 

For the same, you can select the order which is in Fulfilled status as shown in the screenshot below:

 



 

Click on More options as shown in the above screenshot.

 

Type in Return as in the screenshot below and select Create Return Label:

 



 

You need to enter the details as shown below and click on Submit.

 



 

Once the return label is generated, you can select the order and click on Print Return Label from the More Options.

 

Do check and let me know if you need any further assistance.

 

Regards,

 

Sibi Firoz

Thank you for your prompt response. 
 


 
 
Apologies for the confusion in my previous email. I don’t want to display the UPS rates in the checkout since I offer free shipping. The automation currently works as follows: for orders within Sweden, the carrier is PostNord; for orders outside Sweden (EU
 and USA), the carrier is UPS, and for the USA the shipping condition is DDP. 
 


 
 
I have now added two more markets — Switzerland and Great Britain — and since both are outside the EU, I want to ensure that these markets will also use UPS with DDP. However, I cannot find where to check or adjust this. 
 


 
 
When I first installed the app, someone from your team helped set everything up, but now I am unable to locate where these settings can be reviewed or edited.

Sagar K S (PluginHive) 
 
Dec 2, 2025, 21:45 GMT+5:30 
 
Hello Federico,

 

Greetings from PluginHive!

 

To show the UPS rates at the checkout for any country, the "Carrier Calculated Shipping" feature should be enabled for your store. 

 

Please reach out to the Shopify team to get this feature enabled. Once done, let us know.

 

Thanks and Regards,

Sagar K S

Team PluginHive
